blocks.text: Liverpool, Barça and Bø — Saturday overflows with Norwegian-flavoured drama
Arsenal lead the Premier League at 61pts, 5 clear of Man City. Liverpool must win at Anfield to keep the pressure on — and tomorrow Arsenal face Chelsea in the defining London derby.

blocks.label: 🎿 Biathlon — Kontiolahti
items: 12:40 — Women's 12.5km Mass Start — Tandrevold, Røiseland, Kirkeeide
14:40 — Men's Relay 4×7.5km — Bø, Lægreid, Tarjei Bø, Christiansen
